      "software engineering",
      "machine learning frameworks like Keras or PyTorch",

      "visualizing and manipulating big datasets",
      "text representation techniques such as ngrams, bag of words, sentiment analysis",
      "statistics and classification algorithms",
      "OpenCV",
      "hardware selection for ML models"
    ],
    "description": "We are looking for a Machine Learning expert to lead our efforts in creating Artificial Intelligence AI and Natural Language Processing NLP based products. Your responsibilities include creating machine learning models and retraining systems. To do this job successfully you need exceptional skills in statistics and programming. If you also have knowledge of data science and software engineering we would like to meet you. Your ultimate goal will be to shape and build efficient self-learning applications.\n\nResponsibilities include understanding business objectives and developing models that help to achieve them along with metrics to track their progress; managing available resources such as hardware, data, and personnel so that deadlines are met; analyzing ML/NLP algorithms to solve problems and ranking them by success probability; exploring and visualizing data; supervising data acquisition; finding datasets online; defining validation strategies; preprocessing and feature engineering; defining data augmentation pipelines; training models and tuning hyperparameters; analyzing errors and designing strategies to overcome them; deploying models to production."
  }
